data.title: Pepe Leads Memecoin Rebound WIth 11% Rally, But Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Not That Far Behind
data.description: Memecoins bounced back with a spirited rally Tuesday following Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) upward advances.

data.title: Palantir Calls For 'Software-First Approach' As Pentagon Spends Under 1% On Modern Warfare
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. Senior Counselor Samantha Clark has urged the Pentagon to embrace commercial software solutions or risk lagging behind global adversaries in an increasingly data-driven battlefield.

data.title: Ronald Reagan Warned That Tariffs Destroy Prosperity — Trump Is Doubling Them Anyway, And Now US Tech Giants Like Apple And Nvidia Are Bracing For Impact
data.description: Former President Ronald Reagan warned that tariffs "destroy prosperity," but in a stark reversal, President Donald Trump is doubling down on protectionist trade policies — a move that's now threatening to raise costs across the U.S. tech sector, from Apple and Nvidia to Amazon and Tesla.

data.title: Elon Musk Says Tesla Will Double US Production in 2 Years After Trump Backs EV Giant Amid Stock Slump
data.description: Elon Musk announces plans to double Tesla vehicle production in US in 2 years, citing support for Trump's policies and confidence in the US.

data.title: Trump's 25% Tariffs On Steel And Aluminum Imports Take Effect, EU Retaliates: US Steel, Nucor, Century Aluminum And Other Domestic Stocks Cheer
data.description: The 25% tariffs on steel and aluminum imports imposed by U.S. President Donald Trump have now taken effect, triggering a swift retaliation from the European Union.
